inputs.label: Values
inputs.businessContext: List of numeric values to calculate average. Standard statistical measure.

inputs.label: Weights
inputs.businessContext: Optional weights for weighted average. Must be non-negative. Used in weighted mean calculations.

inputs.label: Average Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of average to compute. Arithmetic mean is standard; geometric for growth rates; harmonic for rates; median for robust central tendency; mode for most frequent value.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in data quality (0-100%). Used to adjust output for uncertainty. Based on ISO 9001 data quality principles.

rules: values must be an array of numbers
if averageType is 'weighted', weights must be provided and have same length as values

thresholds.dataConfidence < 50: Low data confidence; results may be unreliable
thresholds.values.length < 3: Small sample size; consider using median

formulas.median: if count(values) % 2 == 1 then sortedValues[floor(count/2)] else (sortedValues[count/2 - 1] + sortedValues[count/2]) / 2

suggestedActions: If data confidence low, verify data sources and improve collection methods.
If sample size small, collect more data or use median for robustness.
If outliers present, consider trimmed mean or median.
